## Applied-AI engineering problem

What concrete user, review, evidence, safety, cost, data, or operating problem does this change solve?

## Change and scope

Describe the smallest change and its non-goals. Link the issue or decision when applicable.

## Evidence

- [ ] A failing test preceded behavior changes.
- [ ] Unit tests pass.
- [ ] Compilation, Ruff, and strict Mypy pass.
- [ ] User-facing behavior or templates have a focused test or worked example.
- [ ] No secret, sensitive payload, prompt, response, personal data, or private endpoint was added.
- [ ] Compatibility impact on module IDs, generated paths, schemas, and re-runs is documented.
- [ ] Documentation and changelog are current.

## Review notes

List important tradeoffs, unknowns, residual risks, and manual checks.
